---
title: "Data homepage"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article  # Options: article (default), full, or custom
    toc: true               # Show Table of Contents
    toc-location: right     # Options: right, left, or body
---

This repo hosts data and quarto plots, to visualize public data related to student literacy outcomes in our NY public schools.  

The plots in this repo are hosted in this repo, seperately from the main website, where they are embedded (NY-website repo).
